title: Stretch Squad Minis 5 Pack Assortment
features: Set of five stretchable monster figures for sensory and imaginative play
Figures stretch up to three times their original size
Two assortments available for collecting and building a stretch squad
Encourages creativity and provides hours of entertainment
Perfect for fidgeting, stress relief, and interactive fun
description: Product Description Stretcherz Stretch Minis Monster Figures is a fun-filled set of stretchable monster figures perfect for sensory play. Each figure can stretch up to three times its size, encouraging imaginative play. With two assortments available, kids can collect them all to build the ultimate stretch squad for endless entertainment and creativity. Safety Warning Keep away from naked flame or open heat sources.
